questions.question: How secure is the patient portal?
questions.answer: Our patient portal meets or exceeds all HIPAA security requirements with enterprise-grade encryption, secure authentication, and regular security audits. All data is encrypted both in transit and at rest, and we implement strict access controls. We also provide HIPAA Business Associate Agreements for all customers.

questions.question: How do patients get access to the portal?
questions.answer: Patients receive an email invitation to activate their portal account. They set up secure credentials and can then access their information immediately. The system can automatically send invitations to your existing patient database during implementation, and your staff can easily send invitations to new patients at check-in.

questions.question: Can patients see their x-rays and images?
questions.answer: Yes, the portal includes the ability to share radiographs, intraoral photos, and other diagnostic images with patients. You control which images are shared, and patients can view these securely through the portal. This feature is particularly valuable for treatment plan acceptance and patient education.

questions.question: How does the messaging system work?
questions.answer: The secure messaging system allows two-way communication between patients and your practice. Messages are organized by conversation threads and can be routed to specific team members. Staff can respond through a dashboard interface, and patients receive notifications of new messages. All communications are archived for documentation purposes.

questions.question: Will this integrate with our current practice management software?
questions.answer: Yes, our patient portal integrates with all major dental practice management systems including Dentrix, Eaglesoft, Open Dental, Curve, and more. The integration is bi-directional, meaning information updated in either system will synchronize automatically, ensuring data consistency across platforms.

reviews.name: Dr. David Wilson
reviews.comment: Since implementing the patient portal, our front desk calls have decreased by over 60%. Patients love the convenience of booking appointments and completing forms online before their visit. The time savings for our staff has been remarkable, allowing us to focus on providing better care to patients in the office.

reviews.name: Amanda Torres
reviews.practice: Office Manager, Bright Smile Dental Group
reviews.comment: The online payment feature alone has transformed our collections process. We've reduced our accounts receivable by 30% and patients appreciate the convenience of paying their bills online. The custom forms builder has also eliminated our paper forms completely, saving time and reducing errors.

reviews.name: Dr. Priya Patel
reviews.comment: Our patients frequently comment on how much they appreciate the portal's messaging feature. They can ask questions without playing phone tag, and we can provide thoughtful responses when we have time. The treatment plan acceptance feature has also significantly improved our case acceptance rates.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Patient Experience?
